rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF IN RE REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST AGREEMENT OF CHARLES ACTIS/CONSOLIDATED WITH CASE NO. PES-05-287457
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion And Notice Of Motion Of Order Directiin Compliance With Subponea Duces Tecum And Dor Expenses Of The Motion
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner's Motion For Order Directing Compliance With Subpoena Duces Tecum is granted as to both subpoenas, limited to Mr. Friedenberg's representation of each trustee of any trust in which Charles Actis was the trustor and any determination of the competency of Charles Actis. Any documents withheld pursuant to a claim of privilege shall be described with specificity in a privilege log. B&P Code exempts members of the bar and their employees from the provision of 2020.420 which requires the deposition officer to be a registered photocopier. The court will not determine whether any privilege attaches to any document on this motion. That issue cannot be determined except by separate motion addressing the various claims of privilege as they may apply to specific documents. Compliance shall be made within 10 days of notice of this order. All requests for sanctions are denied. (612/HEWLETT)
